CONTENT.Club career: Alemdar started playing football for Kayserispor at the age of 10.On 12 March 2018, he signed his first professional contract with Kayserispor aged 15. He became the youngest captain of Kayserispor history when he made also his professional debut for the club in a Turkish Cup tie against Manisa FK on 19 December 2019, aged 17.Alemdar moved to Ligue 1 club Rennes in August 2021.Alemdar was signed by Ligue 2 club Troyes on loan for the 2023–24 season.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the Stade Rennais F.C. websiteDoğan Alemdar at the Turkish Football FederationDoğan Alemdar at SoccerwayDoğan Alemdar at WorldFootball.net

SUMMARY: Doğan Alemdar (born 29 October 2002) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for  Ligue 1 club Rennes.
